title: Copycat Costco Chicken Bake
description: A homemade version of the iconic Costco food court chicken bake — chicken, bacon, cheese, and Caesar dressing wrapped in pizza dough.

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Season chicken breasts with garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Bake or pan-sear until cooked through (165°F internal). Let cool slightly, then dice into small cubes.
Cook bacon until crispy. Crumble or chop into small pieces.
In a bowl, combine diced chicken, bacon, mozzarella/Mexican cheese, Parmesan, and Caesar dressing. Mix well.
Divide pizza dough into 4 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a rectangle about 6x10 inches.
Place 1/4 of the filling down the center of each dough rectangle. Fold the sides over the filling and pinch to seal. Place seam-side down on the baking sheet.
Brush each chicken bake with beaten egg. Sprinkle with a little extra Parmesan and oregano if desired.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown.
instructions.tip: Let them cool for 5 minutes before cutting — the filling is molten hot.

storageInstructions: Refrigerate up to 3 days. Reheat in oven at 350°F for 10-15 minutes. Can freeze unbaked for up to 2 months.
leftoverIdeas: Slice and serve over salad for a deconstructed chicken bake bowl
